extension.summary: AutoCompletion for the virtual keyboard (needs skin support)
extension.description: AutoCompletion for the virtual keyboard (needs skin support)
extension.summary: Autocompletar para el teclado virtual (necesita soporte de skin)
extension.description: Autocompletar para el teclado virtual (necesita soporte de skin)
Private setup helper for a configured family Kodi environment. Contains no credentials.
extension.news:
v0.4.2 - Public metadata cleanup
v0.4.1 - Internal setup flow cleanup
v0.4.0 - Internal setup updates
v0.3.0 - Internal setup updates
v0.2.0 - Added setup menu
v0.1.0 - Initial private helper add-on

extension.summary: Access your content from Easynews and Debrid Clouds.
extension.description: This add-on is intended for advanced Kodi users only. You must own the content of any media you play through this addon. This is an English language only add-on.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.news:
[v2.0.16.1004]: * Add TorBox Web Download cloud support so web-hosted uploads can be scraped, browsed, resolved, and deleted alongside TorBox torrent and usenet cloud items. * Prefer TorBox file short names during cloud scraping so webhoster folder prefixes do not block title matching.
INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within Tools of add-on.

extension.summary: Access your content from Easynews and Debrid Clouds.
extension.description: This add-on is intended for advanced Kodi users only. You must own the content of any media you play through this addon. This is an English language only add-on.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.news:
[v2.0.16.1014]: * Enable TorBox Search Cloud Storage by default and migrate existing Fen Light English installs to turn it on without changing TorBox authorization.
[v2.0.16.1013]: * Add TorBox Web Download cloud support so web-hosted uploads can be scraped, browsed, resolved, and deleted alongside TorBox torrent and usenet cloud items. * Prefer TorBox file short names during cloud scraping so webhoster folder prefixes do not block title matching.
[v2.0.15.1012]: * Refresh the Trakt and Real-Debrid QR-backed device-auth flow with styled Trakt QR cards, direct activation QR targets where available, and the latest English auth prompt behavior.
INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within Tools of add-on.

extension.summary: Access your content from Easynews and Debrid Clouds.
extension.description: This add-on is intended for advanced Kodi users only. You must own the content of any media you play through this addon. This is an English language only add-on.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.news:
[v2.0.71.1011]: * Add TorBox Usenet Search controls for movies and TV shows, plus automatic no-results retry support for cached TorBox Usenet Search. * Keep the English build free of the normal-repo a4k subtitle-service changes.
[v2.0.70.1010]: * Seed first-run Fen Light Patched English settings from the live profile for non-secret preferences, including CocoScrapers, list/result/playback preferences, size filters, pagination, and update behavior. * Keep credentials, tokens, account values, local machine paths, and KodiEnglish repository targets out of the seed.
[v2.0.70.1009]: * Add TorBox Web Download cloud support so hoster uploads such as GoFile-backed items appear in TorBox cloud scraping, browsing, resolving, and deleting alongside torrent and usenet items. * Validate TorBox Web Download playback behavior without shipping temporary scrape/resolver diagnostics, and keep the short-name title-match fix.
[v2.0.65.1008]: * Refresh the English Trakt and Real-Debrid QR-backed device-auth flow with styled Trakt QR cards, direct activation QR targets where available, and the latest QR prompt behavior.
[v2.0.65]: * Pull in the latest Extras trailer fixes, guard duplicate Trakt re-authorization prompts, skip watched-indicator refresh on invalid Trakt payloads, and rotate auth QR image filenames so Kodi refreshes changed device codes.
[v2.0.64]: * Force Extras trailer playback into fullscreen video and stop the trailer when Back leaves fullscreen playback.
[v2.0.63]: * In Extras, fetch TMDb's standalone videos list when localized metadata has no trailers so Dutch metadata can still play English YouTube trailers.
[v2.0.62]: * Prefer playable YouTube trailer keys in the extras window, fall back to the best sorted YouTube trailer when raw trailer metadata is missing or non-plugin, and show a clearer no-trailer notice instead of failing playback.
[v2.0.60]: * Use stable Trakt list IDs for custom/user list browsing, pagination, cache keys, like/unlike, and owned-list edits, with legacy slug fallback for old shortcuts and widgets.
[v2.0.59]: * Update the bundled default Trakt client ID and secret, and keep the settings manager restore-default actions aligned with the new Trakt defaults.
[v2.0.57]: * Refresh a stale Trakt access token once with the stored refresh token before showing the re-authentication prompt, and avoid caching invalid Trakt activity payloads. * Restore a dedicated in-play next-episode jump from the OSD while keeping Stop behavior available for episode playback.
[v2.0.52]: * Fix local resume bookmark cleanup after playback stop, including newer Kodi video-database detection and safer bookmark clearing around the patched playback flow.
[v2.0.50]: * Add a bundled default OMDb API key so patched Fenlight ships with extra-ratings support enabled without manual OMDb key entry.
[v2.0.48]: * Update the built-in default TMDb API key and keep the Restore Default TMDb API Key action aligned with the new bundled value.
[v2.0.47]: * Roll back the stricter playback-start validation from 2.0.46 and republish the prior startup behavior under a higher version so Kodi updates away from the bad test build cleanly.
[v2.0.46]: * Tighten playback-start validation so a source that only reaches a half-started state gets about 5 seconds of main startup plus a short grace settle before Fen retries the next candidate instead of treating started playback as automatically successful. * Keep the current hybrid handoff, and note that an intermittent Real-Debrid/Kodi teardown hang after stop() is still under investigation when a bad stream refuses to close quickly.
[v2.0.45]: * Strip tracker suffix noise like .rartv. and .eztv before release-group matching so season-pack sources such as S01 BiRDHOUSE rank above weaker same-quality fallbacks when their episode subtitle release matches.
[v2.0.44]: * Skip autoplay sources only when every detected audio stream is a blocked pirate-language track, so bad metadata cannot allow Russian-only/Chinese-only/Ukrainian-only sources and mixed-language sources with an acceptable track can still play.
[v2.0.43]: * Use the show's original or English title plus the actual episode name when building TV subtitle-search metadata and filenames, reducing mismatches on localized show labels.
[v2.0.42]: * Skip autoplay sources whose detected audio streams are Russian-only, Ukrainian-only, or Chinese-only unless the selected title metadata already expects that spoken language.
[v2.0.41]: * Add an explicit Trakt authorization status row to the settings window so expired or incomplete auth is visible even when a stale username is still stored. * Only show Authorize when Trakt is not fully authorized and keep Revoke tied to a stored Trakt user instead of treating the username as the only auth signal.
[v2.0.40]: * Demote bare generic movie-title subtitles to low-confidence fallbacks so structured release-specific matches can win when available. * Demote low-information source containment hits against structured DVDRip-style subtitles so malformed or ambiguous source names stop outranking stronger higher-quality matches.
[v2.0.39]: * Republished the TMDb metadata language and fallback-language controls under a higher production-safe test version.
[v2.0.38]: * Add TMDb metadata language and fallback-language settings for movie, TV, collection, episode, and people details. * Fill missing summaries from the configured fallback language instead of dropping back to English-only metadata requests.
[v2.0.37]: * Rebrand the patched add-on metadata under DutchTech so Kodi listings no longer show the upstream provider name for this repo build.
[v2.0.36]: * Add support for up to three Gemini API keys with automatic fallback on rate-limit or quota-exhaustion responses. * Expand the subtitle-backed retry pool to the best 10 selector-ranked candidates and let subtitle comments promote a stronger alias for the same subtitle item when they improve the release match.
[v2.0.35]: * Teach Gemini intent parsing to preserve named people separately from generic keywords so movie AI searches can feed TMDb cast-aware discovery and better title-like prompt handling.
[v2.0.34]: * Preserve meaningful technical bracket segments during bundled subtitle-selector normalization so release matching keeps cues like [1080p], codec tags, and year-style bracket tokens instead of discarding them as noise.
[v2.0.33]: * Add TMDb collection-search support for movie searches so matching collection results can open directly into the related movie-set listing.
[v2.0.32]: * Republish the same Gemini-backed AI Search test build under a higher test-only version so Kodi updates cleanly from the current production 2.0.31 release.
[v2.0.31]: * Add Gemini-backed AI Search inside Fen Light Patched so natural-language discovery can build TMDb-backed movie and TV result lists without leaving the patched addon. * Store AI Search history locally and expose a Gemini API key field in the existing settings manager.
[v2.0.30]: * Clear local Kodi bookmark rows using the real plugin:// playback URLs so erase-bookmark actions target the active movie or episode instead of relying on the old broad filename match.
[v2.0.28]: * Keep the smoother autoplay handoff that waits for fullscreen before closing the resolver window, reducing the flash back to the skin start screen. * Bridge selector playback metadata into Kodi properties so patched a4k can consume the exact selector-chosen subtitle for the active source at runtime. * Trim the successful pre-player settle before player.run(...) to reduce startup latency without changing retry timing.
[v2.0.26]: * Ship Fen Light Patched with reuse language invoker disabled by default so repo installs stop re-enabling it for setups that expect it off.
[v2.0.25]: * Refresh packaged branding and artwork so repo installs no longer reuse the old selector-test presentation.
[v2.0.24]: * Prefer direct subtitle filename evidence over uploader comments when both are available. * Strip OpenSubtitles track and language suffixes before source/subtitle matching.
[v2.0.23]: * Bundle the subtitle selector inside the add-on instead of depending on an external dev repo path. * Build the autoplay retry pool from one title-level subtitle gather and local selector ranking.
INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within Tools of add-on.

extension.description: TMDb Helper liefert Details über Filme, Fernsehsendungen und Schauspieler aus TMDb. Benutzer können auf eine Vielzahl von Listen aus TMDb TVDb MDbList und Trakt zugreifen.
TMDb Helper Patched provides details about movies, tvshows and actors from TMDb. Users can access a variety of lists from TMDb TVDb MDbList and Trakt.
TMDb Helper dostarcza szczegółowych informacji o filmach, serialach i aktorach z serwisu TMDb. Użytkownicy mają dostęp do szeregu list z serwisów TMDb, TVDb, MDbList i Trakt.
TMDb Helper tillhandahåller information om filmer, tv-serier och skådespelare från TMDb. Användare kan få tillgång till en mängd olika listor från TMDb, TVDb, MDbList och Trakt.
TMDb 助手从 TMDb（影视数据库） 获取电影、电视剧及演员的详细信息。用户可访问来自 TMDb、TVDb、MDbList 和 Trakt 的各类影视列表。
extension.disclaimer: Daten bereitgestellt von TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV und Trakt. Einige der Informationen werden von TheTVDB.com bereitgestellt. Bitte erwäge sie zu unterstützen. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
Data provided by TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV and Trakt. Some of the information is provided by TheTVDB.com. Please consider supporting them. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
Dane dostarczane przez TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV i Trakt. Niektóre informacje pochodzą z serwisu TheTVDB.com. Prosimy o rozważenie wsparcia tych serwisów. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
Data tillhandahållen av TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV och Trakt. En del av informationen tillhandahålls av TheTVDB.com. Stöd dem gärna. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
数据由 TMDb、TVDb、MDbList、OMDb、FanartTV 和 Trakt 提供。部分信息由 TheTVDB.com 提供，建议您支持他们。订阅链接：https://thetvdb.com/subscribe

extension.description: Coloured Studio Icons
White Weather Icons
Provides signal/slot mechanism for inter-addon communication
Module providing some AutoCompletion functions

Certifi is a carefully curated collection of Root Certificates for validating the trustworthiness of SSL certificates while verifying the identity of TLS hosts. It has been extracted from the Requests project.
The Universal Character Encoding Detector
Internationalized Domain Names for Python

extension.summary: Python wrapper for setInfo on Nexus InfoTags
extension.description: Python wrapper for setInfo on Nexus InfoTags
Common code required by TMDbHelper and other related jurialmunkey add-ons
TMDb 助手及其他相关 jurialmunkey 插件所需的通用代码
This module uses image libraries, Python Imaging Library (PIL) by default, to generate QR Codes.

extension.summary: Requests is an elegant and simple HTTP library for Python, built for human beings.
extension.description: Requests is an elegant and simple HTTP library for Python, built for human beings.
A library for easily adding evaluatable expressions into python projects
Python 2 and 3 compatibility utilities
Unidecode, lossy ASCII transliterations of Unicode text

extension.summary: urllib3 is a powerful, user-friendly HTTP client for Python
extension.description: urllib3 is a powerful, user-friendly HTTP client for Python. Much of the Python ecosystem already uses urllib3 and you should too. urllib3 brings many critical features that are missing from the Python standard libraries

extension.news: [fix] translations in PVR |contrib: Dis90| [fix] titles missing in some dialogs [fix] handle missing profiles.xml gracefully (fixes Apple TV) [lang] update translations from Weblate
extension.description: إضافة مخصصه للمظهر لتوفير إدارة بسيطة للودجيت "الأقسام" و الاختصارات على الشاشة (تتطلب دعم المظهر لها)
Doplněk pro vzhledy poskytující jednoduchý management a seznamy uživatelských zkratek (vyžaduje podporu vzhledu)
Add-on til skins der giver enkel styring og lister over brugergenveje (kræver skin-understøttelse)
Addon für Skins zum einfachen Bearbeiten und Auflisten von benutzerdefinierten Verknüpfungen (erfordert Skinunterstützung)
Πρόσθετο για κελύφη, το οποίο παρέχει έναν απλό τρόπο διαχείρισης και κατηγοριοποίησης των συντομεύσεων του χρήστη (πρέπει να υποστηρίζεται από το κέλυφος)
Add-on for skins to provide simple managing and listing of user shortcuts (requires skin support)
Add-on for skins to provide simple managing and listing of user shortcuts (requires skin support)
Add-on for skins to provide simple managing and listing of user shortcuts (requires skin support)
Complemento para las pieles para proporcionar una gestión sencilla y lista de atajos de usuario (requiere que la piel lo soporte)
Lisäosa, joka mahdollistaa ulkoasujen valikkokohteiden ja omien pikavalintojen lisäyksen ja niiden muokkauksen (vaatii tuen ulkoasulta)
Addiciel pour habillages qui fournit une gestion simple et un listage des raccourcis utilisateurs (exige la prise en charge de l'habillage)
Module complémentaire pour les skins pour fournir une gestion et une liste simples de raccourcis utilisateur (nécessite la prise en charge des skins)
Complemento que fornece aos temas dunha xestión sinxela dos atallos dos usuarios (require soporte do tema)
Dodatak za presvlake koji omogućuje jednostavno upravljanje i prikaz prečaca korisnika (zahtijeva podršku presvlake)
Felszín kiegészítő amely könnyen kezelhetővé és listázhatóvá teszi a felhasználói parancsikonokat (Felszín támogatás szükséges)
Viðbót fyrir viðmót til að halda utan um flýtivísa og fá yfirlit yfir þá (þarfnast stuðnings frá viðmóti)
Add-on per gli skin per consentire un facile gestione ed elenco delle scorciatoie utente (richiede che lo skin lo supporti)
사용자 단축키의 간단한 관리 및 목록을 제공하는 스킨용 애드온(스킨 지원 필요)
Priedas teminėms išvaizdoms, kad jos turėtų galimybę paprastai tvarkyti ir atvaizduoti vartotojo sukurtas nuorodas (reikalingas teminės išvaizdos palaikymas)
Tillegg for enkel administrering og opplisting av bruker-snarveier i tema (krever støtte i tema)
Add-on voor skins om te voorzien in het eenvoudig beheren en sorteren van gebruikers snelkoppelingen (vereist skin ondersteuning)
Wtyczka dla skór, która zapewnia proste zarządzanie i tworzenie list skrótów użytkownika (wymaga wsparcia skóry)
Add-on para que as skins possam prover gerenciamento de lista de atalhos para o menu principal (requer suporte da skin)
Um add-on que permite que os temas tenham recursos simples para gerir e listar atalhos de utilizadores (é necessário suporte do tema)
Дополнение для обложек, предоставляющее простой способ управления пользовательскими ярлыками (требуется поддержка обложкой)
Doplnok poskytujúci jednoduchý manažment zoznamu užívateľských odkazov (vyžaduje podporu v doplnku pre vzhľad)
Skinntillägg som tillhandahåller enkel hantering och översikt av användargenvägar (om skinnet stöder det)
皮肤加载项，提供简单的用户快捷方式管理和列表（需要皮肤支持）
插件为皮肤提供了简单的管理和用户连接方式列表 (需要皮肤支持)

extension.summary: Skin Variables helps skinners to construct variables and expressions for multiple containers and listitems using a template
Skin Variables 帮助皮肤设计者使用模板为多个容器和列表项构建变量及表达式
Skin Variables aide les skinners à créer des variables et des expressions pour plusieurs conteneurs et listes à l'aide d'un modèle
Skin Variables hjälper de som bygger skal att skapa variabler och uttryck för flera behållare och listobjekt med hjälp av en mall
extension.description: Skin Variables helps skinners to construct variables and expressions for multiple containers and listitems using a template
Skin Variables 帮助皮肤设计者使用模板为多个容器和列表项构建变量及表达式
Skin Variables aide les skinners à créer des variables et des expressions pour plusieurs conteneurs et listes à l'aide d'un modèle
Skin Variables hjälper de som bygger skal att skapa variabler och uttryck för flera behållare och listobjekt med hjälp av en mall

extension.summary: Texture Maker helps skinners build gradient based textures
extension.description: Texture Maker helps skinners build gradient based textures
Arctic Fuse 3 Patched is a minimal row based skin with customisable widgets
Arctic Horizon 2 Patched
Install this repository to receive Kodi English add-on updates from a GitHub Pages-hosted source.
